rows.label: qev014002_MSG0001
rows.name:
Damn it! What the hell is this monster...!
No matter how much I shoot, it won't go down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014002_MSG0002
rows.name:
Wha—! You're... a BLADE!
My pursuers are already here...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014002_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Listen, we were just exterminating the devils
who are selling out our comrades to the aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014002_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's not like we have any intention
of harming other Earthlings!
On the contrary, we're just trying to protect them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014002_MSG0005
rows.name:
So... please! Let me go!
I don't have the leeway to deal with you right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014002_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell him his actions are unforgivable,
regardless of his reasons.

rows.label: qev014002_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask whose orders he was following
if he wants you to let him go.

rows.label: qev014002_MSG0006
rows.name: Tch, dog of the alien reconciliation faction...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014002_MSG0007
rows.name:
Then before dealing with this monster...
I'll just have to eliminate you first![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014002_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'll finish you off in one shot, too!
You traitor!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014002_MSG0010
rows.name:
It's meaningless to ask that!
Because you're going to die... right here, right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014002_MSG0011
rows.name:
Before I take down this monster,
I'll finish you off in one shot!
You dog of the alien reconciliation faction!![ST:wait ]
